transcript: Hey, I need a health check endpoint. Add a GET /health route that returns JSON with two fields: status set to ok, and timestamp set to the current time in ISO 8601 format. It should return a 200 status code. That's it, keep it simple.

call_analysis.call_summary: User requested a health check endpoint at GET /health returning JSON with status ok and current ISO 8601 timestamp.

custom_analysis_data.call_summary: Add GET /health endpoint returning { status: 'ok', timestamp: '<ISO8601>' } with 200 status.
